results.input_data: Create 2 Contact records in Salesforce with dummy data that looks like real filling all the mandatory and optional fields available for Contact record. Upon successful save of the record, validate the field values to be matching and true and return the Salesforce record id for confirmation.
results.expected_output: Record or operation completed successfully in Salesforce with valid data returned
